150 C5 C5_SPEECH_CLARITY (C5) Speech Clarity CHAR 1 Communications/hearing patterns: speech clarity. 0 = Clear Speech - distinct, intelligible words, 1 = Unlcear Speech - slurred, mumbled words, 2 = No Speech - absence of spoken words, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
151 C6 C6_UNDERSTAND_OTH (C6) Ability to Understand
